use_cases: Landing page hero section with animated globe for SaaS platforms
Product showcase with global theme for tech companies
Animated visual element for international service landing pages
Dark-themed hero component for modern web applications
Full-screen animated entry point for digital product sites
ai_summary: A dark-themed landing page hero section featuring an animated rotating globe with twinkling star effects. The component uses CSS keyframe animations to create continuous motion with a globe image, multiple animated stars, and layered inset shadows for depth. Built with React and styled using Tailwind CSS, this composite component creates an immersive 3D-like visual experience suitable for SaaS, dev-tools, or global service landing pages.
